source_point_summary: The author expected the book to be read from cover to cover.
routing_rationale: Direct owner observation about author flow and sequence.

source_point_summary: The author expected the reader to be able to go back in the book at any time.
routing_rationale: Directly grounds the need for passage-level restoration.

source_point_summary: The author expects a certain reader level and independence.
routing_rationale: Important for protocol design but too detailed for the short questionnaire answer.

source_point_summary: In normal continuous book reading the note could be enough.
routing_rationale: Preserves the first major tension in the raw comments.

source_point_summary: In an excerpt-library this note is not enough on its own.
routing_rationale: Strongest owner-faithful basis for the final questionnaire choice.

source_point_summary: Not every reference-back needs the same amount of recovery support.
routing_rationale: Drives the orientational vs concept-building split.

source_point_summary: This specific note is not just orientational; it is building further on what came before.
routing_rationale: Decisive structural classification of the case.

source_point_summary: The library should provide the answer path instead of relying on the owner to search for it.
routing_rationale: Direct owner demand about environment quality.

source_point_summary: The system should not lean toward 'no full texts, only excerpts' in every case.
routing_rationale: Motivates passage-level linkage and reference layers.

source_point_summary: An excerpt is evolving into a teaching unit rather than staying a pure quote only.
routing_rationale: Major conceptual shift that should not be hidden inside the app answer.

source_point_summary: The original source text must remain the center even as support expands.
routing_rationale: Preserves the strongest restraint on overexpansion.

source_point_summary: The owner opens excerpts with zero pre-context and expects full guidance.
routing_rationale: One of the most important operating assumptions in the raw comments.
